summary: Iteration 84 - Live Price Feeds Testing: CoinGecko integration for crypto and ASX/yfinance for hybrids. All 15 backend API tests passed. Fixed MARKET_DATA undefined bug in CryptoPortfolio.jsx. Both frontend pages load live prices on mount and refresh buttons work.

minor.issue: Route conflict with crypto_integration.py - old static prices served instead of new CoinGecko live prices. Live prices accessible via /api/crypto/portfolio/value instead.

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ crypto_prices.py: CoinGecko API integration working - fetches live BTC at $101,344 AUD, ETH at $3,124 AUD
✅ hybrid_prices.py: yfinance integration fetches live ASX prices for NABPH, MQGPD; simulated fallback for CBAPD, WBCPI, ANZPJ
✅ CryptoPortfolio.jsx: Now has MARKET_DATA constant defined (was causing ReferenceError)
✅ HybridsTrading.jsx: Fetches live prices on mount via axios, shows 'Prices updated from ASX' toast
⚠️ Route prefix conflict: Both crypto_integration.py and crypto_prices.py use prefix='/crypto' - first registered wins for duplicate paths

success_rate.frontend: 100% (both pages load live data, refresh works)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 84 verified live price feeds: 1) Crypto prices from CoinGecko working via /api/crypto/portfolio/value (BTC ~$101K AUD, ETH ~$3K AUD), 2) Hybrid prices from ASX via yfinance working (NABPH $102.93, MQGPD $100.79 live; others simulated), 3) CryptoPortfolio.jsx had MARKET_DATA undefined bug which was fixed by adding the constant, 4) Both pages now fetch live data on mount and display properly.

crypto_coingecko_integration.verification: /api/crypto/global and /api/crypto/portfolio/value return live CoinGecko data with source='CoinGecko'

hybrid_asx_integration.verification: /api/hybrids/prices returns live ASX data for NABPH, MQGPD (live_data=true) and simulated for others

crypto_portfolio_frontend.verification: Page loads with Portfolio Value $121,782, 5 crypto cards, Refresh button works

hybrids_trading_frontend.verification: Page loads with Market Value $174,861, 5 hybrid cards, Refresh button works with 'Prices updated from ASX' toast

refresh_buttons.verification: Both pages have Refresh button that triggers API calls

mocked_apis_list: Hybrid prices (simulated for CBAPD, WBCPI, ANZPJ when ASX live data unavailable via yfinance)
MARKET_DATA in CryptoPortfolio (static Fear/Greed index=65, trending coins)

bug_fixed.fix: Added MARKET_DATA constant with fearGreedIndex and trending coins
